reviews.title: Regional Operations Director
reviews.standout_notes: Jacob really stood out — charisma, asked great questions, demonstrated genuine interest and readiness to get to work. Would love this kid on my team.
reviews.concerns: No concerns. Glad for the invite, got to preview candidates and start early relationships with strong candidates.
reviews.meta_notes: Arturo proactively submitted feedback on the event and voluntarily identified himself despite the form being anonymous. Shows strong engagement with the hiring process and genuine investment in talent pipeline.
reviews.clifton_johnson_note: Proactively flagged by hiring team for follow-up — was quiet at the event but team sees potential worth validating in a more focused conversation.
